steps.assistant_text: The months-documented '-O0 temp-pool artifact, NOT C-steerable' cap was pure decl order: at -O0, register locals RESERVE frame slots in decl sequence — declaring int *call_root FIRST (before the register root/mid/child) puts it at top slot 0x34. The old negative had it after the register decls. Distinct-symbol desc stores resolve to zero-value undefined_syms placeholders (baked lui 0/addiu 0).

metadata.verification: 92/92 word-exact (relocs resolved via undefined_syms incl zero-value desc placeholders) + make verify ROM byte-identical
